Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Teach]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Teach states that without an Emperor, the Imperial Guard will fall apart.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Teach is a character who spoke about announcing an Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Teach had a confrontation in the room around the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Teach has enhancements.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Teach was losing a fight against Jorin.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — Teach is the Guild Head of the Imperial Guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — Teach is a General in the Imperial Guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — Teach replaced her own heart with the heart of a Bonereaver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — Teach is a member of the Imperial Guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — Teach is going to meet the Emperor.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 1''' — Teach is described as being just an animal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 1''' — Teach is a General.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Teach is a character who glares at Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Teach is going to throw a party.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Teach carries a weapon called Tyrfang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Teach is sitting on one side of Calder in the negotiation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Teach performed a shoulder-tackle on Estyr.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Teach used Tyrfang to defend the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Teach pumped power from her Vessel into Tyrfang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Teach's hair was burned away completely after taking Jorin's blow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Teach has silver-and-blue eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Teach personally executed Calder's father.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Teach is considered dangerous even without his Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Teach is a guard flanking Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Teach leaped after Estyr Six and Kern while wielding Tyrfang.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
